content: Set the default storage quota for rooms in this {{productName}}. It can later be adjusted for each room individually by the room admin.

comment.text: "This translation key controls the default storage quota setting displayed to users when adjusting room quotas. It can later be adjusted individually by room admins. Appears in the 'QuotaPerRoom' category."

usage.context:
<StyledBaseQuotaComponent>
 <CategoryItem
 title={t("QuotaPerRoom")}
 onClickLink={onClickLink}
 url="portal-settings/management/disk-space/quota-per-room"
 subtitle={t("SetDefaultRoomQuota", {
 productName: t("Common:ProductName"),
 })}
 isDisabled={isDisabled}
 />
 <CategoryItem

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'الحصة النسبية' (relative quota/proportion) is used instead of 'الحصة التخزينية' or 'حصة التخزين' (storage quota). In this context, 'relative' changes the technical meaning of a fixed storage limit.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: قم بتعيين حصة التخزين الافتراضية للغرف في {{productName}} هذا. يمكن تعديلها لاحقًا لكل غرفة على حدة من قبل مسؤول الغرفة.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Spanish translation uses the masculine pronoun 'ajustarlo' (referring to 'el administrador' or 'el producto'), but the English text refers to adjusting the 'quota' (la cuota), which is feminine. This creates a grammatical mismatch in meaning regarding what is being adjusted.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Establezca la cuota de almacenamiento predeterminada para las salas de este {{productName}}. Posteriormente, el administrador de la sala puede ajustarla para cada sala individualmente.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Gender mismatch: 'quota' (feminine in Italian) is referred to with the masculine pronoun 'modificato' instead of 'modificata'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Imposta la quota di archiviazione predefinita per le stanze in questo {{productName}}. Successivamente può essere modificata individualmente per ciascuna stanza dall'amministratore della stanza.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Japanese translation incorrectly attaches '{{productName}}' to 'rooms' ({{productName}}ルーム), implying the rooms belong to the product, whereas the English 'rooms in this {{productName}}' implies the rooms exist within the product environment. More importantly, the Japanese phrasing 'この{{productName}}ルーム' (this {{productName}} room) changes the meaning from 'rooms in this product' (plural) to 'this product's room' (singular/specific), which contradicts the English 'rooms' (plural).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: この{{productName}}内のルームのデフォルトのストレージ容量制限を設定してください。容量制限は、後でルーム管理者によって各ルームごとに個別に調整できます。

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Gender disagreement: 'cota' (quota) is a feminine noun in Portuguese, but the verb 'ajustado' is in the masculine form. It should be 'ajustada' to agree with 'cota'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Defina a cota de armazenamento padrão para salas neste {{productName}}. Posteriormente, pode ser ajustada para cada sala individualmente pelo administrador da sala.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Gender disagreement: 'cota' (quota) is a feminine noun in Portuguese, but the verb 'ajustado' is in the masculine form. It should be 'ajustada' to agree with 'cota'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Defina a cota de armazenamento padrão para salas neste {{productName}}. Posteriormente, pode ser ajustada para cada sala individualmente pelo administrador da sala.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation contains a repetitive and nonsensical word fragment 'sobe.' at the end of the sentence, which breaks the flow and meaning.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Nastavite privzeto kvoto prostora za shranjevanje za sobe v tem {{productName}}. Kasneje se lahko prilagodi za vsako sobo posebej s strani skrbnika sobe.
